description_long: This is a classic porcelain teapot with a rounded, bulbous body and a gently domed lid topped by a small knob. The teapot features a prominent, elegantly curved spout and a large, gold-trimmed handle, both seamlessly integrated into the body. The surface is adorned with delicate floral motifs, including a central bouquet with birds, and a subtle pink and gold border pattern encircling the upper rim and lid. The main color is a soft, creamy white, complemented by gold accents on the handle, spout, and rim. The teapot's glossy finish gives it a refined, high-quality appearance, suitable for both functional and decorative use. Its size and design suggest it is intended for serving tea in a domestic or formal setting.
description: A porcelain teapot with a domed lid, gold-trimmed handle and spout, and floral motifs on a creamy white body. Glossy finish and elegant decorative details.
description_view_0: The teapot is viewed from the back, showing the handle centered and the gold trim along the rim and base, with minimal decoration visible.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the floral motif with birds, the curved spout to the right, and the gold-trimmed handle to the left.
description_view_2: The teapot is seen from the spout side, with the spout centered and the domed lid and gold accents clearly visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the handle centered, the floral motif partially visible, and the spout extending to the left.
attribute_spout_orientation: Curved spout angled slightly upward, positioned at the front right of the main body.
attribute_handle_design: Large, rounded loop handle with gold trim, attached at the upper rim and lower body, thick and ergonomically curved.
attribute_lid_presence: Present; domed lid with a small central knob, fits snugly.
attribute_decorative_patterns: Floral and bird motif on the body, pink and gold border patterns around the rim and lid.
